policy.copied_or_adapted_code: Keep upstream copyright and license notice with the SVGlide artifact that contains the copied or substantially adapted portion.
policy.reference_absorption: Record provenance and keep implementation SVGlide-owned; do not embed upstream HTML, CSS, JS, screenshots, or renderer source unless separately recorded.
policy.satori: Satori is an MPL-2.0 runtime dependency and must remain external to the artboard renderer bundle.
